subject: Cetoddle, a small round white whale-like Pokemon standing on ice with a joyful expression
description: A small, chubby, nearly spherical Pokemon resembling a baby beluga whale stands upright on a field of ice and snow, tiny flippers raised at its sides. Its body is almost entirely white with a smooth, round surface, and it wears a wide open-mouthed smile of pure delight. The background is a bright, wintry expanse of blue sky and icy white terrain, with soft light giving the whole scene a cheerful, crisp quality. The creature's posture — arms out, mouth open, body tilted forward slightly — reads as carefree and celebratory.
foreground: Cetoddle standing on ice, round white body, tiny flippers raised, joyful open-mouthed smile
background: Icy snowy terrain under a bright blue sky
emotion: pure joy — open-mouthed smile, arms raised, exuberant posture
